citations.quote:
2 attachments (444 KB)
Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf; Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf;

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0066 email states it contains two embedded PDF attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'.
The pdftotext extraction method used for NAP-SRC-0066 does not extract embedded attachment binary data. The attachments are not present as separate source files in the evidence manifest.

No tool configured for extracting embedded PDF attachments is available in the current tool registry. A follow-up task is needed to extract the attachments using a suitable tool (e.g., pdfdetach, Apache PDFBox, or manual extraction).

proposed_artifacts.content: The source NAP-SRC-0066 (Slateford Road Trimester 2 Full Flat Inspections email) references two embedded PDF attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. The initial pdftotext extraction did not capture these attachments. A follow-up task (T-B17-3-extract-attachments) is proposed to extract the embedded files using a tool such as pdfdetach or Apache PDFBox. Once extracted, the attachments should be added to the source inventory and processed for text extraction.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction Note for NAP-SRC-0066 Embedded Attachments

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a tool capable of extracting embedded PDF attachments (e.g., pdfdetach from poppler-utils, Apache PDFBox, or manual extraction) to extract the two attachments referenced in NAP-SRC-0066: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. Save the extracted files as new sources in the 01-sources directory with appropriate source IDs (e.g., NAP-SRC-0066-attachment-1, NAP-SRC-0066-attachment-2). Then run text extraction on the new sources.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded attachments from NAP-SRC-0066 PDF using pdfdetach or similar tool

risk_flags.text: The referenced Tenancy Agreement and Schedule of Charges are critical documents for the matter but are not yet available as separate sources.

summary: The extracted text of NAP-SRC-0066 references two embedded PDF attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. The text extraction method (pdftotext) did not extract the embedded attachment binary data. The attachments are not available as separate source files in the evidence manifest. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded attachments using a tool capable of handling PDF portfolio or embedded files.

uncertainties.text: The embedded attachments were not extracted by the initial pdftotext process; their content is unknown.
No extraction tool for embedded PDF attachments is currently configured in the harness.
